nodes.label: Tests that we handle closed streams correctly.
Multiple RST_STREAM frames can be received, either at once or well         after
The remote peer creating a stream with a lower ID than one we've seen         ca
When streams have been closed, they get removed from the streams         diction
RST_STREAM frame should be ignored if stream is in a closed state.         See R
WINDOW_UPDATE frame should be ignored if stream is in a closed state.         Se
A stream that is closed by receiving END_STREAM raises         ProtocolError whe
A stream that is closed by sending END_STREAM raises         ProtocolError when
A stream that is closed by sending END_STREAM will raise         ProtocolError w
A stream that is closed by receive RST_STREAM can receive further         frames
A stream that is closed by receive RST_STREAM can receive further         DATA f
A stream that is closed by sent RST_STREAM can receive further frames:         i
A stream that is closed by sent RST_STREAM can receive further         data fram
